perf.acceptance_note: accepted gates lifecycle only (terminals, teardowns, no poisoning); sample_output_checks are recorded numerics per the gate-mode control-envelope finding.
perf.b_semantics: HC boundaries are replicated per-rank compute on local_batch rows; A5F single-GPU B corresponds to local_batch, not the global batch
perf.methodology: paired interleaved graph replay: both lanes resident, ref/fused replayed back-to-back each step with alternating order; per-step delta is a paired difference
